title: The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap Gameplay Map

subject.name: The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap

narrative.description: Capcom's GBA Zelda introduces Kinstone fusion and Minish shrinking, enabling dual-scale dungeon puzzles and hat-based tool progression across Hyrule.
narrative.core_loop: Shrink to Minish size for micro-dungeons, fuse Kinstones to unlock secrets, acquire hat tools from caves, and restore Vaati's damage to Hyrule.

mechanics.map_notes: Gust jar, Mole mitts, and shrinking open distinct puzzle routes.
mechanics.expression: Gust jar, Mole mitts, and shrinking open distinct puzzle routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Kinstone fusions gate NPC events, chests, and heart pieces.
mechanics.expression: Kinstone fusions gate NPC events, chests, and heart pieces.

mechanics.map_notes: Hyrule Town and field hubs connect to element dungeons via story flags.
mechanics.expression: Hyrule Town and field hubs connect to element dungeons via story flags.

mechanics.map_notes: New tools reveal secrets in previously visited areas.
mechanics.expression: New tools reveal secrets in previously visited areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Element sanctuary bosses grant elements required for later dungeons.
mechanics.expression: Element sanctuary bosses grant elements required for later dungeons.

mechanics.map_notes: Minish-scale hazards like water droplets and boots test precision.
mechanics.expression: Minish-scale hazards like water droplets and boots test precision.

mechanics.map_notes: Figurines, heart pieces, and fusion rewards extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Figurines, heart pieces, and fusion rewards extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Sword combat with spin attack and item integration.
mechanics.expression: Sword combat with spin attack and item integration.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Gyorg Pair follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Gyorg Pair follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Vaati fight spans multiple forms and arenas.
mechanics.expression: Vaati fight spans multiple forms and arenas.

mechanics.map_notes: Heart containers deplete from contact and enemy hits.
mechanics.expression: Heart containers deplete from contact and enemy hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Owl statues and dungeon entrances save progress.
mechanics.expression: Owl statues and dungeon entrances save progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Darknuts telegraph sword swings before striking.
mechanics.expression: Darknuts telegraph sword swings before striking.

mechanics.map_notes: Spin attack clears groups and activates switches.
mechanics.expression: Spin attack clears groups and activates switches.

mechanics.map_notes: Shops sell arrows, bombs, and bottles.
mechanics.expression: Shops sell arrows, bombs, and bottles.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap through its core action-adventure loop.
